QuerySecurityGroupsList.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QuerySecurityGroupsList.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000; default value is 1000
QuerySecurityGroupsList.instanceId: Cloud product instance ID, used to query the list of security groups associated with the instance. Leave empty to query all created security groups.
QuerySecurityGroupsList.vpcId: VPC instance ID, used to query the list of security groups associated with the instance. Required if instanceId is specified.
QuerySecurityGroupsList.securityGroupId: Specifies the security group to query
QuerySecurityGroupsList.securityGroupIds: Specifies multiple security groups to query, with multiple security group IDs separated by commas
